verdict_reason: Pre-bootstrap backfill for task 2C.4 (Performance optimization). Task completed BEFORE Plan v13 §C gate became operational. This verdict is HUMAN-ATTESTED via the substrate evidence listed in manifest_evidence; it is NOT a Codex-generated verdict and does not satisfy the §C-server CI re-validation requirement. The §C-server CI gate will not fire on these tasks because no commit triggers it; these tasks pre-date the gate. Future commits to these task scopes WILL be gated normally.
rationale: 6 perf gates on chromium: DOMContentLoaded < 2000ms, tab-switch < 250ms, Charts < 2500ms, FCP < 1500ms.
